SEARCH
Package it.unipi.tonightscall.service

Class OrganizationService

java.lang.Object
it.unipi.tonightscall.service.OrganizationService
@Service public class OrganizationService extends Object
Service class handling complex business logic for Controllers.

Unlike AuthService which handles authentication, this service manages operations requiring interaction between different entities (e.g., an Organization adding a join Request).

  • Method Details

    • getAllOrganizations

      public org.springframework.data.domain.Page<@NonNull OrganizationDTO> getAllOrganizations(org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)

    • getOrganizationById

      public OrganizationDTO getOrganizationById(String id)

    • addJoinRequest

      public void addJoinRequest(String organizationId, String id)
      Adds an Organizer's new join Request to the list of pending requests.

      This method:

      1. Checks if the Organizer exists.
      2. Checks if the Organization exists.
      3. Adds the user to the friend's friend list.
      4. Saves the users to MongoDB.
      5. Saves the corresponding nodes in the Graph Database (Neo4j).

      Parameters:
      organizationId - The id of the Organization that was asked to be joined.
      id - The id of the Organizer sending the request to join.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If the Organizer or the Organization are not found.

    • acceptJoinRequest

      public OrganizationDTO acceptJoinRequest(String newMemberId, String id)
      Accepts an Organizer's join Request.

      This method:

      1. Checks if the Organization exists.
      2. Checks if the Organizer (new member) exists.
      3. Adds the user to the friend's friend list.
      4. Saves the users to MongoDB.
      5. Saves the corresponding nodes in the Graph Database (Neo4j).

      Parameters:
      newMemberId - The id of the Organizer who is to be accepted as new member of the Organization.
      id - The id of the Organization.
      Returns:
      The new OrganizationDTO.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If the Organizer or Organization are not found, or if the Organizer's pending request is not found.

    • updateOrganization

      @Transactional public OrganizationDTO updateOrganization(String organizationId, OrganizationDTO newOrganizationDTO)
      Updates Organization data

      This method:

      1. Checks if the Organization exists.
      2. Deletes the Organization from the Organizer's organizations.
      3. Saves the updated Organization to MongoDB.

      Parameters:
      organizationId - The Id of the Organization to update.
      newOrganizationDTO - The OrganizationDTO containing the new data.
      Returns:
      The updated OrganizationDTO.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If the Organization is not found, or organizationIdif the current user tries to update an Organization they aren't part of.

    • deleteRequest

      @Transactional public OrganizationDTO deleteRequest(String organizerUsername, String id)
      Deletes the pending request of an Organizer to join an Organization

      This method:

      1. Checks if the Organizer exists.
      2. Checks if the Organization exists.
      3. Deletes the Organizer's request from the list of the Organization's pending requests.
      4. Saves the updated Organization to MongoDB.

      Parameters:
      organizerUsername - The Username of the Organizer.
      id - The name of the Organization from whom the request must be deleted.
      Returns:
      The updated OrganizationDTO.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If the organizer is not found or if the Organization is not found.

    • getOrganizationAnalisys

      public List<HashMap<?,?>> getOrganizationAnalisys(String organizationId)
      Business logic for generating organization analytics. Verifies the existence of the entity and ensures that only entities
      Parameters:
      organizationId - The unique identifier (username/id) of the organization.
      Returns:
      A list of HashMaps containing aggregated statistics.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the organization is not found or the entity type is invalid.
